summary: Iteration 245: Complete testing of 3 tracks - Quote Request Flow Optimization, Payment Review Drawer, and CRM Refinements. All features verified working correctly.

features_verified: 3-step progress indicator (What you need, Timeline, Contact)
4 need type cards (Products, Promotional, Services, Other)
Description textarea and quantity input
Service pre-fill from URL params (?type=service_quote&service=printing-promotional-materials)
Auto-select Services card when pre-filled
Read-only service name field when pre-filled
Step 2 Timeline - 4 urgency options (Flexible, Within month, Within week, Urgent)
Step 2 Budget range dropdown (6 ranges)
Step 3 Contact fields (name, email, company, phone)
Request summary card in Step 3
Auto-fill for logged-in users with 'Auto-filled from your account' badge
Form submission to POST /api/public-requests
Inline success state with reference number (REQ-XXXXXX-XXXXXX)
24-hour expected response message
'Submit Another Request' button works
'Browse Marketplace' button works
Canonical 5-section layout
Section 1: Status Banner (Pending Review / Approved / Rejected)
Section 2: PAYER DETAILS (Payer Name, Phone, Email)
Section 3: CUSTOMER / ACCOUNT (Customer name, Company)
Section 4: INVOICE / REFERENCE (Invoice No., Expected Amount, Amount Paid, Payment Mode, Submitted date, View Invoice link)
Section 5: PAYMENT PROOF (Inline image preview for images, file card for non-images)
File card shows filename and 'Open' link for PDF files
Approve Payment button (green) with Loader2 spinner support
Reject button (red) with prompt for rejection reason
Table header shows 'Assigned Rep' instead of 'Owner'
Status dropdown has text-sm font-semibold for improved readability
Next Follow-up column shows overdue badge (red bg) for past dates
Kanban cards show assigned rep name
Kanban cards show overdue follow-up badge in red
Lead drawer shows Next Follow-up with overdue highlighting (red border/bg for past dates)
Create lead form shows 'Assign Sales Rep' placeholder

critical_code_review_comments: QuoteRequestPage.jsx properly implements 3-step wizard with URL pre-fill and logged-in user auto-fill
PaymentsQueuePage.jsx drawer has canonical 5-section layout with inline proof preview
CRMPageV2.jsx correctly renamed 'Owner' to 'Assigned Rep' and added overdue highlighting
All components have proper data-testid attributes for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 245 verified 3 tracks: (1) Quote Request Flow at /request-quote with 3-step wizard, pre-fill from URL params, and logged-in user auto-fill. (2) Payment Review Drawer at /admin/payments with canonical 5-section layout and inline proof preview. (3) CRM refinements at /admin/crm with 'Assigned Rep' header, improved status dropdown font, and overdue follow-up highlighting in table/kanban/drawer. Note: The payments page route is /admin/payments (not /admin/payments-queue).
